summary: Raj Empire Esports - A gaming platform with Player Panel and Admin Panel. Current work involves fixing OTP authentication error, redesigning UI with dark background and orange/white theme, and adding domain settings in Admin Panel.
architectural_notes: Project has two panels: Player Panel (/player) and Admin Panel (/admin)
Brand name: Raj Empire Esports — to be used consistently across the app
known_issues: OTP generation fails with 'Unauthorized: Only authenticated users can generate OTPs' in both User and Admin panels

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix OTP error 'Unauthorized: Only authenticated users can generate OTPs' in both User and Admin panels
UI Redesign with dark background and orange & white mix theme for both User Panel and Admin Panel
Add domain settings option in Admin Panel with default value 'Raj-Empire-Esports' that admin can change

Fix the OTP generation error 'Unauthorized: Only authenticated users can generate OTPs' in the backend. The `generateOTP` function must allow unauthenticated (anonymous) callers so that new players can register and existing players can log in without needing a prior authenticated session.

Redesign the entire frontend UI — both the Player Panel (Register, Login, Dashboard, Home, Tournaments, Terms pages) and the Admin Panel (Admin Login, Admin Dashboard) — with a dark background base and a mixed orange & white color theme. Use deep dark backgrounds (near-black or very dark gray), vibrant orange as the primary accent color for buttons, highlights, borders, and active states, and white/light gray for primary text and secondary elements. Apply this consistently across all pages, cards, forms, modals, headers, footers, and navigation.
Add a persistent `domainName` field to the backend actor state with a default value of 'Raj-Empire-Esports'. Expose `getDomainName` (public query) and `setDomainName` (admin-only update) functions.

Add a 'Domain Settings' section in the Admin Dashboard page. It must display the current domain name fetched from the backend and provide a text input field with a Save button that allows the admin to update the domain name. The default value shown must be 'Raj-Empire-Esports'.
